topic.what: Parameter-efficient fine-tuning of TinyLlama-1.1B for automated security log analysis
topic.how: LoRA fine-tuning on 450 domain-specific SOC examples enables threat classification, MITRE ATT&CK mapping, and severity assessment
topic.why_matters: Democratizes security operations for SMBs unable to afford enterprise SOC infrastructure or commercial SIEM platforms

characteristics.what_it_measures: Percentage of correctly classified threat types from raw log entries
characteristics.evidence: 50-example held-out evaluation set, exact match on THREAT_TYPE field
characteristics.context: Baseline produces unstructured verbose output; regex extractor scores zero on exact match metrics

characteristics.what_it_measures: Harmonic mean of threat classification precision and recall
characteristics.context: F1 of 0.68 reflects 71% precision and 66% recall

characteristics.what_it_measures: Fraction of predicted threats that are correct
characteristics.context: High precision indicates few false positives in threat classification

characteristics.what_it_measures: Fraction of actual threats correctly identified
characteristics.context: 66% recall leaves room for improvement with larger training set

characteristics.evidence: 50-example held-out set, exact match on SEVERITY field
characteristics.context: 30 pp improvement from baseline partial keyword matching to structured classification

characteristics.what_it_measures: Number of parameters updated during LoRA fine-tuning
characteristics.evidence: LoRA rank=16, alpha=32, targeting 7 attention/MLP projection layers
characteristics.context: 1.13% of base model parameters; adapter-only training preserves base model

characteristics.evidence: Single NVIDIA T4 GPU, batch size 16, learning rate 2e-4
characteristics.context: Enables rapid iteration and deployment in resource-constrained settings

characteristics.what_it_measures: Average time to analyze one log entry on GPU
characteristics.context: Supports real-time triage for SMB daily review cycles

characteristics.what_it_measures: Average time to analyze one log entry on CPU only
characteristics.context: Overnight batch processing feasible for resource-constrained deployments

characteristics.what_it_measures: Log entries processed per minute on GPU
characteristics.context: 1000-entry log file fully analyzed in under 30 minutes
Compact model enables consumer-grade GPU deployment

characteristics.what_it_measures: Storage footprint of LoRA adapter weights

characteristics.context: Fits within 16GB T4 VRAM budget with room for batching
